final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for bubble tea in pink girly summer aesthetic for Xiaohongshu cover.

Style/medium: flat illustration with soft gradients, social media cover design, trending Xiaohongshu aesthetic
Composition: centered vertical layout optimized for 3:4 mobile feed, bubble tea as hero element with breathing room
Subject: pearl milk tea in clear cup, tapioca pearls visible at bottom, creamy milk tea layers, condensation droplets on cup
Scene/backdrop: minimal abstract pastel pink gradient background, subtle summer elements like soft bokeh light spots
Lighting/mood: bright daylight ambiance, fresh and refreshing summer vibe, playful and youthful energy
Color palette: soft pink as dominant base, creamy beige for milk tea, dark brown pearls as contrast, white highlights
Materials/textures: glossy plastic cup surface, creamy liquid texture, chewy tapioca pearls, water droplets
Text (verbatim): "小红书种草封面"
Constraints: must read clearly as mobile thumbnail at small size; vertical orientation optimized for Xiaohongshu feed
Avoid: cluttered composition, dark moody tones, realistic photography style, generic stock photo look, watermark
